description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.5.3-jdk-8 Docker image, with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Define variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS set to '-s ci_settings.xml --batch-mode' and MAVEN_OPTS set to '-Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository'. Add a build job in the build stage that runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS compile' and caches the .m2/repository/ and target/ directories. Add a test job in the test stage that runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test' and uses the same cache. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch and executes 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy'.
